title: LighterWise Pack
description: An optimization modpack with QoL and graphical upgrades  🏳️‍🌈
body:
# Lighterwise Pack 🧡🔦 [![Built on Fabulously Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/built-with/fabulously-optimized_46h.png)](https://download.fo) **⚠️ This pack includes InvMove which WILL trigger anti-cheat on some public servers if not disabled. ⚠️** This pack is meant to be fast with optimized settings out of the box but also provide beautiful (optional) graphics and quality of life mods and resource packs such as item pickup notifications, A system clock display, Discord rich presence and more useable on any public server with first class support on our own [Minecraft SMP Server](https://lighterwise.gay/eridu/)! This modpack also includes Distant Horizons with compatible shaders, The Visuality Mod, The Ambient Sounds Mods and more to improve visual fidelity & immersion while providing an optimized experience. If you would like to join our public SMP server, access can be gained by joining our [Discord](https://discord.gg/lighterwise) and agreeing to the rules. Any feedback or issues about this modpack can be provided to me on [GitHub](https://github.com/gabehxd/Lighterwise-Pack/issues) # Credits ## Art & Backgrounds 🎨 Included, beautiful art for multiple menus and loading screens! All art is used with permission from the artists and their socials can be found below! > [Lucas](https://x.com/theskycat101)
> [Moon](https://x.com/Lunahasjumpped) If you're interested in adding your art to this project, please contact me on Discord. ### **If for any reason you need to hide the loading screen art this can be done so by disabling FancyMenu & Drippy Loading Screen in the mod list** ## Vanilla Tweaks 🔧 Versions 1.5.0 and above include Vanilla Tweaks which can be found [here](https://vanillatweaks.net/). ## Pretty Optimized 🌺 If you're interested in a similar modpack without all the branding check out [Pretty Optimized](https://modrinth.com/project/al0zyQf0)! 🏳️‍🌈
